error_pattern: NZ sites consistently underperform AU counterparts. platypus-nz (42%) and skechers-nz (40%) are worst.
notes: Clear AU > NZ pattern: drm-au 60% vs drm-nz 63% (exception), platypus-au 52% vs platypus-nz 42%, skechers-au 62% vs skechers-nz 40%, vans-au 59% vs vans-nz 53%. NZ staging sites appear less stable or have more region-specific content mismatches. Overall ~54% pass rate of tests that ran — basic page loads work but interactive/content-specific tests fail.
